path.description: Path identifies the field, section, or artifact path associated with the error.

message.description: Message is the human-readable explanation of the problem.

ErrorDetail.description: ErrorDetail describes one machine-readable validation or execution problem in a command result.

from_plan_path.description: FromPlanPath is the source plan path for transitions that move or archive a plan.

from_supplements_path.description: FromSupplementsPath is the source supplements directory for transitions that move a whole plan package.

to_plan_path.description: ToPlanPath is the destination plan path for transitions that create or move a plan artifact.

to_supplements_path.description: ToSupplementsPath is the destination supplements directory for transitions that move a whole plan package.

local_state_path.description: LocalStatePath is the plan-local control-plane state path when one exists.

current_plan_path.description: CurrentPlanPath is the worktree-level current-plan pointer path when the command updated it.

LifecycleArtifacts.description: LifecycleArtifacts lists the relevant plan and local-state paths for a lifecycle command result.

revision.description: Revision is the current plan-local revision number.

reopen_mode.description: ReopenMode is the active reopen mode when a reopen repair path is in effect.

land_pr_url.description: LandPRURL is the pull request URL recorded for the land phase.

land_commit.description: LandCommit is the merge commit or landed commit recorded for the land phase.

LifecycleFacts.description: LifecycleFacts carries selected lifecycle-specific details that remain useful after the contract converges on the shared v0.2 envelope.

ok.description: OK reports whether the command succeeded.

command.description: Command is the stable command identifier for the result payload.

summary.description: Summary is the concise human-readable outcome description.

state.description: State carries the post-command workflow node in the shared v0.2 envelope.

facts.description: Facts carries selected high-signal lifecycle details when they help explain the post-command state.

artifacts.description: Artifacts points to relevant plan and local-state paths for the command.

oneOf.description: NextAction lists the most relevant follow-up steps in priority order.

next_actions.description: NextAction lists the most relevant follow-up steps in priority order.

errors.description: Errors lists hard failures that prevented the command from succeeding.

LifecycleResult.description: LifecycleResult is the JSON result shape currently shared by `harness execute start`, `harness archive`, `harness reopen`, `harness land`, and `harness land complete`.

current_node.description: CurrentNode is the canonical v0.2 workflow node after the command runs.

LifecycleState.description: LifecycleState carries the post-command workflow node for lifecycle commands.

oneOf.description: Command is the suggested command line to run next when the next step is best expressed as a harness command.

command.description: Command is the suggested command line to run next when the next step is best expressed as a harness command.

description.description: Description explains the suggested next step in plain language.

NextAction.description: NextAction describes one concrete follow-up action that the caller should consider after reading a command result.

title: Lifecycle command result
description: Shared JSON output shape for lifecycle commands such as `harness execute start`, `harness archive`, `harness reopen`, `harness land`, and `harness land complete`.
